verses.latin_vulgate: Locutus est autem David Domino verba carminis hujus in die qua liberavit eum Dominus de manu omnium inimicorum suorum, et de manu Saul.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֤ר דָּוִד֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֖י הַשִּׁירָ֣ה הַזֹּ֑את בְּיוֹם֩ הִצִּ֨יל יְהֹוָ֥ה אֹת֛וֹ מִכַּ֥ף כׇּל־אֹיְבָ֖יו וּמִכַּ֥ף שָׁאֽוּל׃
verses.king_james: And David spake unto the Lord the words of this song in the day that the Lord had delivered him out of the hand of all his enemies, and out of the hand of Saul:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait :   Dominus petra mea, et robur meum, et salvator meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמַ֑ר יְהֹוָ֛ה סַֽלְעִ֥י וּמְצֻדָתִ֖י וּמְפַלְטִי־לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And he said, The Lord is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer;

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus fortis meus : sperabo in eum ;  scutum meum, et cornu salutis meæ :  elevator meus, et refugium meum ;  salvator meus : de iniquitate liberabis me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלֹהֵ֥י צוּרִ֖י אֶחֱסֶה־בּ֑וֹ מָגִנִּ֞י וְקֶ֣רֶן יִשְׁעִ֗י מִשְׂגַּבִּי֙ וּמְנוּסִ֔י מֹשִׁעִ֕י מֵחָמָ֖ס תֹּשִׁעֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: The God of my rock; in him will I trust: he is my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower, and my refuge, my saviour; thou savest me from violence.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudabilem invocabo Dominum,  et ab inimicis meis salvus ero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְהֻלָּ֖ל אֶקְרָ֣א יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמֵאֹיְבַ֖י אִוָּשֵֽׁעַ׃
verses.king_james: I will call on the Lord, who is worthy to be praised: so shall I be saved from mine enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia circumdederunt me contritiones mortis :  torrentes Belial terruerunt me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י אֲפָפֻ֖נִי מִשְׁבְּרֵי־מָ֑וֶת נַחֲלֵ֥י בְלִיַּ֖עַל יְבַעֲתֻֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: When the waves of death compassed me, the floods of ungodly men made me afraid;

verses.latin_vulgate: Funes inferni circumdederunt me :  prævenerunt me laquei mortis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶבְלֵ֥י שְׁא֖וֹל סַבֻּ֑נִי קִדְּמֻ֖נִי מֹ֥קְשֵׁי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.king_james: The sorrows of hell compassed me about; the snares of death prevented me;

verses.latin_vulgate: In tribulatione mea invocabo Dominum,  et ad Deum meum clamabo :  et exaudiet de templo suo vocem meam,  et clamor meus veniet ad aures ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּצַּר־לִי֙ אֶקְרָ֣א יְהֹוָ֔ה וְאֶל־אֱלֹהַ֖י אֶקְרָ֑א וַיִּשְׁמַ֤ע מֵהֵֽיכָלוֹ֙ קוֹלִ֔י וְשַׁוְעָתִ֖י בְּאׇזְנָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: In my distress I called upon the Lord, and cried to my God: and he did hear my voice out of his temple, and my cry did enter into his ears.

verses.latin_vulgate: Commota est et contremuit terra ;  fundamenta montium concussa sunt, et conquassata :  quoniam iratus est eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ותגעש) [וַיִּתְגָּעַ֤שׁ] וַתִּרְעַשׁ֙ הָאָ֔רֶץ מוֹסְד֥וֹת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם יִרְגָּ֑זוּ וַיִּֽתְגָּעֲשׁ֖וּ כִּי־חָ֥רָה לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Then the earth shook and trembled; the foundations of heaven moved and shook, because he was wroth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit fumus de naribus ejus,  et ignis de ore ejus vorabit :  carbones succensi sunt ab eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָלָ֤ה עָשָׁן֙ בְּאַפּ֔וֹ וְאֵ֥שׁ מִפִּ֖יו תֹּאכֵ֑ל גֶּחָלִ֖ים בָּעֲר֥וּ מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: There went up a smoke out of his nostrils, and fire out of his mouth devoured: coals were kindled by it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inclinavit cælos, et descendit :  et caligo sub pedibus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥ט שָׁמַ֖יִם וַיֵּרַ֑ד וַעֲרָפֶ֖ל תַּ֥חַת רַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: He bowed the heavens also, and came down; and darkness was under his feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ascendit super cherubim, et volavit :  et lapsus est super pennas venti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּרְכַּ֥ב עַל־כְּר֖וּב וַיָּעֹ֑ף וַיֵּרָ֖א עַל־כַּנְפֵי־רֽוּחַ׃
verses.king_james: And he rode upon a cherub, and did fly: and he was seen upon the wings of the wind.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit tenebras in circuitu suo latibulum,  cribrans aquas de nubibus cælorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֥שֶׁת חֹ֛שֶׁךְ סְבִיבֹתָ֖יו סֻכּ֑וֹת חַֽשְׁרַת־מַ֖יִם עָבֵ֥י שְׁחָקִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And he made darkness pavilions round about him, dark waters, and thick clouds of the skies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præ fulgore in conspectu ejus,  succensi sunt carbones ignis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִנֹּ֖גַהּ נֶגְדּ֑וֹ בָּעֲר֖וּ גַּחֲלֵי־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Through the brightness before him were coals of fire kindled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tonabit de cælo Dominus,  et excelsus dabit vocem suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַרְעֵ֥ם מִן־שָׁמַ֖יִם יְהֹוָ֑ה וְעֶלְי֖וֹן יִתֵּ֥ן קוֹלֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord thundered from heaven, and the most High uttered his voice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit sagittas et dissipavit eos ;  fulgur, et consumpsit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֥ח חִצִּ֖ים וַיְפִיצֵ֑ם בָּרָ֖ק (ויהמם) [וַיָּהֹֽם]׃
verses.king_james: And he sent out arrows, and scattered them; lightning, and discomfited them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et apparuerunt effusiones maris,  et revelata sunt fundamenta orbis  ab increpatione Domini,  ab inspiratione spiritus furoris ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּֽרָאוּ֙ אֲפִ֣קֵי יָ֔ם יִגָּל֖וּ מֹסְד֣וֹת תֵּבֵ֑ל בְּגַעֲרַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה מִנִּשְׁמַ֖ת ר֥וּחַ אַפּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And the channels of the sea appeared, the foundations of the world were discovered, at the rebuking of the Lord, at the blast of the breath of his nostrils.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit de excelso, et assumpsit me,  et extraxit me de aquis multis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁלַ֥ח מִמָּר֖וֹם יִקָּחֵ֑נִי יַֽמְשֵׁ֖נִי מִמַּ֥יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: He sent from above, he took me; he drew me out of many waters;

verses.latin_vulgate: Liberavit me ab inimico meo potentissimo,  et ab his qui oderant me :  quoniam robustiores me erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַצִּילֵ֕נִי מֵאֹיְבִ֖י עָ֑ז מִשֹּׂ֣נְאַ֔י כִּ֥י אָמְצ֖וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.king_james: He delivered me from my strong enemy, and from them that hated me: for they were too strong for me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prævenit me in die afflictionis meæ,  et factus est Dominus firmamentum meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְקַדְּמֻ֖נִי בְּי֣וֹם אֵידִ֑י וַיְהִ֧י יְהֹוָ֛ה מִשְׁעָ֖ן לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: They prevented me in the day of my calamity: but the Lord was my stay.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit me in latitudinem :  liberavit me, quia complacui ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּצֵ֥א לַמֶּרְחָ֖ב אֹתִ֑י יְחַלְּצֵ֖נִי כִּי־חָ֥פֵֽץ בִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: He brought me forth also into a large place: he delivered me, because he delighted in me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Retribuet mihi Dominus secundum justitiam meam :  et secundum munditiam manuum mearum reddet mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִגְמְלֵ֥נִי יְהֹוָ֖ה כְּצִדְקָתִ֑י כְּבֹ֥ר יָדַ֖י יָשִׁ֥יב לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: The Lord rewarded me according to my righteousness: according to the cleanness of my hands hath he recompensed me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia custodivi vias Domini,  et non egi impie a Deo meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י שָׁמַ֖רְתִּי דַּרְכֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹ֥א רָשַׁ֖עְתִּי מֵאֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.king_james: For I have kept the ways of the Lord, and have not wickedly departed from my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia enim judicia ejus in conspectu meo,  et præcepta ejus non amovi a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י כׇל־מִשְׁפָּטָ֖ו לְנֶגְדִּ֑י וְחֻקֹּתָ֖יו לֹא־אָס֥וּר מִמֶּֽנָּה׃
verses.king_james: For all his judgments were before me: and as for his statutes, I did not depart from them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ero perfectus cum eo,  et custodiam me ab iniquitate mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶהְיֶ֥ה תָמִ֖ים ל֑וֹ וָאֶשְׁתַּמְּרָ֖ה מֵעֲוֺנִֽי׃
verses.king_james: I was also upright before him, and have kept myself from mine iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et restituet mihi Dominus secundum justitiam meam,  et secundum munditiam manuum mearum in conspectu oculorum suorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֧שֶׁב יְהֹוָ֛ה לִ֖י כְּצִדְקָתִ֑י כְּבֹרִ֖י לְנֶ֥גֶד עֵינָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Therefore the Lord hath recompensed me according to my righteousness; according to my cleanness in his eye sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum sancto sanctus eris,  et cum robusto perfectus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִם־חָסִ֖יד תִּתְחַסָּ֑ד עִם־גִּבּ֥וֹר תָּמִ֖ים תִּתַּמָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: With the merciful thou wilt shew thyself merciful, and with the upright man thou wilt shew thyself upright.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum electo electus eris,  et cum perverso perverteris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִם־נָבָ֖ר תִּתָּבָ֑ר וְעִם־עִקֵּ֖שׁ תִּתַּפָּֽל׃
verses.king_james: With the pure thou wilt shew thyself pure; and with the froward thou wilt shew thyself unsavoury.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et populum pauperem salvum facies :  oculisque tuis excelsos humiliabis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־עַ֥ם עָנִ֖י תּוֹשִׁ֑יעַ וְעֵינֶ֥יךָ עַל־רָמִ֖ים תַּשְׁפִּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: And the afflicted people thou wilt save: but thine eyes are upon the haughty, that thou mayest bring them down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia tu lucerna mea, Domine,  et tu, Domine, illuminabis tenebras meas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה נֵירִ֖י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיהֹוָ֖ה יַגִּ֥יהַּ חׇשְׁכִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: For thou art my lamp, O Lord: and the Lord will lighten my darkness.

verses.latin_vulgate: In te enim curram accinctus :  in Deo meo transiliam murum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י בְכָ֖ה אָר֣וּץ גְּד֑וּד בֵּאלֹהַ֖י אֲדַלֶּג־שֽׁוּר׃
verses.king_james: For by thee I have run through a troop: by my God have I leaped over a wall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, immaculata via ejus ;  eloquium Domini igne examinatum :  scutum est omnium sperantium in se.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֵ֖ל תָּמִ֣ים דַּרְכּ֑וֹ אִמְרַ֤ת יְהֹוָה֙ צְרוּפָ֔ה מָגֵ֣ן ה֔וּא לְכֹ֖ל הַחֹסִ֥ים בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: As for God, his way is perfect; the word of the Lord is tried: he is a buckler to all them that trust in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est Deus præter Dominum,  et quis fortis præter Deum nostrum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י מִי־אֵ֖ל מִבַּלְעֲדֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמִ֥י צ֖וּר מִֽבַּלְעֲדֵ֥י אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: For who is God, save the Lord? and who is a rock, save our God?

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus qui accinxit me fortitudine,  et complanavit perfectam viam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֵ֥ל מָעוּזִּ֖י חָ֑יִל וַיַּתֵּ֥ר תָּמִ֖ים (דרכו) [דַּרְכִּֽי]׃
verses.king_james: God is my strength and power: and he maketh my way perfect.

verses.latin_vulgate: Coæquans pedes meos cervis,  et super excelsa mea statuens me ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְשַׁוֶּ֥ה (רגליו) [רַגְלַ֖י] כָּאַיָּל֑וֹת וְעַ֥ל בָּמֹתַ֖י יַעֲמִדֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: He maketh my feet like hinds’ feet: and setteth me upon my high places.

verses.latin_vulgate: docens manus meas ad prælium,  et componens quasi arcum æreum brachia mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְלַמֵּ֥ד יָדַ֖י לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה וְנִחַ֥ת קֶשֶׁת־נְחוּשָׁ֖ה זְרֹעֹתָֽי׃
verses.king_james: He teacheth my hands to war; so that a bow of steel is broken by mine arms.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dedisti mihi clypeum salutis tuæ,  et mansuetudo tua multiplicavit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּתֶּן־לִ֖י מָגֵ֣ן יִשְׁעֶ֑ךָ וַעֲנֹתְךָ֖ תַּרְבֵּֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast also given me the shield of thy salvation: and thy gentleness hath made me great.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dilatabis gressus meos subtus me,  et non deficient tali mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּרְחִ֥יב צַעֲדִ֖י תַּחְתֵּ֑נִי וְלֹ֥א מָעֲד֖וּ קַרְסֻלָּֽי׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast enlarged my steps under me; so that my feet did not slip.

verses.latin_vulgate: Persequar inimicos meos, et conteram,  et non convertar donec consumam eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶרְדְּפָ֥ה אֹיְבַ֖י וָאַשְׁמִידֵ֑ם וְלֹ֥א אָשׁ֖וּב עַד־כַּלּוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: I have pursued mine enemies, and destroyed them; and turned not again until I had consumed them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Consumam eos et confringam, ut non consurgant :  cadent sub pedibus meis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֲכַלֵּ֥ם וָאֶמְחָצֵ֖ם וְלֹ֣א יְקוּמ֑וּן וַֽיִּפְּל֖וּ תַּ֥חַת רַגְלָֽי׃
verses.king_james: And I have consumed them, and wounded them, that they could not arise: yea, they are fallen under my feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accinxisti me fortitudine ad prælium :  incurvasti resistentes mihi subtus me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּזְרֵ֥נִי חַ֖יִל לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה תַּכְרִ֥יעַ קָמַ֖י תַּחְתֵּֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: For thou hast girded me with strength to battle: them that rose up against me hast thou subdued under me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inimicos meos dedisti mihi dorsum ;  odientes me, et disperdam eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֹ֣יְבַ֔י תַּ֥תָּה לִּ֖י עֹ֑רֶף מְשַׂנְאַ֖י וָאַצְמִיתֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast also given me the necks of mine enemies, that I might destroy them that hate me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamabunt, et non erit qui salvet ;  ad Dominum, et non exaudiet eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁע֖וּ וְאֵ֣ין מֹשִׁ֑יעַ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלֹ֥א עָנָֽם׃
verses.king_james: They looked, but there was none to save; even unto the Lord, but he answered them not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Delebo eos ut pulverem terræ ;  quasi lutum platearum comminuam eos atque confringam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶשְׁחָקֵ֖ם כַּעֲפַר־אָ֑רֶץ כְּטִיט־חוּצ֥וֹת אֲדִקֵּ֖ם אֶרְקָעֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Then did I beat them as small as the dust of the earth, I did stamp them as the mire of the street, and did spread them abroad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salvabis me a contradictionibus populi mei ;  custodies me in caput gentium :  populus quem ignoro serviet mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽתְּפַלְּטֵ֔נִי מֵרִיבֵ֖י עַמִּ֑י תִּשְׁמְרֵ֙נִי֙ לְרֹ֣אשׁ גּוֹיִ֔ם עַ֥ם לֹא־יָדַ֖עְתִּי יַעַבְדֻֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Thou also hast delivered me from the strivings of my people, thou hast kept me to be head of the heathen: a people which I knew not shall serve me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii alieni resistent mihi ;  auditu auris obedient mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י נֵכָ֖ר יִתְכַּחֲשׁוּ־לִ֑י לִשְׁמ֥וֹעַ אֹ֖זֶן יִשָּׁ֥מְעוּ לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Strangers shall submit themselves unto me: as soon as they hear, they shall be obedient unto me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii alieni defluxerunt,  et contrahentur in angustiis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י נֵכָ֖ר יִבֹּ֑לוּ וְיַחְגְּר֖וּ מִמִּסְגְּרוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Strangers shall fade away, and they shall be afraid out of their close places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vivit Dominus, et benedictus Deus meus,  et exaltabitur Deus fortis salutis meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַי־יְהֹוָ֖ה וּבָר֣וּךְ צוּרִ֑י וְיָרֻ֕ם אֱלֹהֵ֖י צ֥וּר יִשְׁעִֽי׃
verses.king_james: The Lord liveth; and blessed be my rock; and exalted be the God of the rock of my salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus qui das vindictas mihi,  et dejicis populos sub me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֵ֕ל הַנֹּתֵ֥ן נְקָמֹ֖ת לִ֑י וּמֹרִ֥יד עַמִּ֖ים תַּחְתֵּֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: It is God that avengeth me, and that bringeth down the people under me,

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui educis me ab inimicis meis,  et a resistentibus mihi elevas me :  a viro iniquo liberabis me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמוֹצִיאִ֖י מֵאֹֽיְבָ֑י וּמִקָּמַי֙ תְּר֣וֹמְמֵ֔נִי מֵאִ֥ישׁ חֲמָסִ֖ים תַּצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: And that bringeth me forth from mine enemies: thou also hast lifted me up on high above them that rose up against me: thou hast delivered me from the violent man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea confitebor tibi, Domine, in gentibus,  et nomini tuo cantabo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֛ן אוֹדְךָ֥ יְהֹוָ֖ה בַּגּוֹיִ֑ם וּלְשִׁמְךָ֖ אֲזַמֵּֽר׃
verses.king_james: Therefore I will give thanks unto thee, O Lord, among the heathen, and I will sing praises unto thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: magnificans salutes regis sui,  et faciens misericordiam christo suo David,  et semini ejus in sempiternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (מגדיל) [מִגְדּ֖וֹל] יְשׁוּע֣וֹת מַלְכּ֑וֹ וְעֹֽשֶׂה־חֶ֧סֶד לִמְשִׁיח֛וֹ לְדָוִ֥ד וּלְזַרְע֖וֹ עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: He is the tower of salvation for his king: and sheweth mercy to his anointed, unto David, and to his seed for evermore.
